entry.title: You are my Favorite Melody
entry.summary:
Author: Bread_and_Bats

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 898Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8

Summary: The silence was deafening. Without the familiar comfort of Bruce's heartbeat, sleep was impossible for Clark. Leading to an unexpected, but not unwelcome, late-night visit to Wayne manor. Wholesomeness ensues.

entry.title: The Fifth Letter
entry.summary:
Author: ObsidianWings_Ink

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,819Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 9

Summary: ​In a universe where the gifted attend the prestigious Academy of Superheroes, fifteen-year-old Bruce Wayne is just a powerless orphan from the bleak streets of Gotham. He has sent five letters, pleading for a single chance. He expected another rejection; he didn't expect a confrontation with Roman Sionis to unlock something mysterious in a dark alleyway.​New romances, new friendships, and new adventures await him—along with a tragic event that lies ahead. ​(More tags will be added as the story progresses.)

entry.title: Bring the Bird Home
entry.summary:
Author: dolcesher

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,717Chapters: 15/16Kudos: 182

Summary: There had been one universe they’d visited in which he and Clark were together. Married. But Bruce refused to think about it. Everything was easier that way.Except now stood a child that seemed to be from a universe much like that one, where he and Clark were not just together, but parents.An eleven year old Dick Grayson is mysteriously transported from a parallel universe where he was adopted by Bruce and Clark as a baby. While Bruce takes care of him, he examines his relationship with his sons, and a certain Kryptonian that won't leave him alone.

entry.title: If ever your heart stops beating I'll be there to bring you back
entry.summary:
Author: Random_Dino_Writes

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,388Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 174

Summary: Bruce is suicidal, Clark can tell, and seemingly despite the vast sea of people who claim to know Bruce deeply, he's the only one. To know any more than that (being that this is a creation of the moment, unplanned and unrefined) I fear you will have to read it. Pity really.

entry.title: The Raven Roosts in the Cornflower Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Aurora2Sunset

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 108,113Chapters: 21/30Kudos: 647

Summary: Someone new moved to Smallville, in the house on the other side of the Kent farm. Clark meets the new kid, Bruce Wayne, and his first impression isn't great. He thinks that Bruce is spoiled and rude and out of place. Maybe that's why he blows up at him. But he still saves him when he's in trouble, that's just the kind of person that Clark is. After a while they develop a tentative kind of friendship over the summer. Bruce isn't like anyone else that Clark knows, and he feels connected to him in all of his out of place-ness. His own feelings for the other take him by surprise, he only hopes that he can stomp them down before he ruins their friendship over them. - Smallville AU where Bruce spends the summers there and befriends Clark long before either of them become superheroes.

entry.title: Winter Steel
entry.summary:
Author: violetlullaby

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 96,465Chapters: 9/28Kudos: 170

Summary: Bruce Wayne battles coming to terms with what it means to fully give himself to the role of Batman when he becomes infatuated with Clark Kent’s life after meeting for a third time. Secrets of the Wayne family begin to unfold as Superman struggles with his own past. Just like steel, Clark mends into something extraordinary, and just like winter, Bruce is desperate for the Sun. — will be completed. (very long story)

entry.title: A promise unspoken
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,704Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: Memories of their last rendezvous taunt Bruce with phantom brushes of a warm hand against his cheek, breath ghosting across his neck, the swipe of a tongue down his sternum. Bruce shudders, squeezes his eyes shut to escape the way his cock twitches. He won't entertain it tonight. He won't. .... Or: Bruce can't stop thinking about fucking Clark.

entry.title: Bruce and Clark
entry.summary:
Author: TS_Rhodes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,841Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 71

Summary: When ten-year-old Bruce Wayne's ride breaks down near the Kent farm, he meets ten-year-old Clark, and a friendship forms. The Kents are concerned about Bruce, since he is recently orphaned. Clark, whose powers are just starting to come in, pleads to keep Bruce as a friend. So they invite Bruce and his guardian Alfred to come back and stay the summer. And so it begins...

entry.title: getting way too deep (i'm into it)
entry.summary:
Author: mitsukiris

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,479Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 37

Summary: 'Harvey raises his glass towards Bruce, as if proposing a toast, “You’ve finally met your match.”Bruce eyes Clark carefully for a moment, a small smile on his lips. He raises his glass, gently touching Harvey’s.“I wasn’t aware of that up until now,” Bruce admits.“Aware of what?” Clark asks, jealousy dripping from his lips.Harvey leans in, “Bruce has always been the crazy jealous one in every relationship,” he whispers. “Nice to see he’s found someone that will match his… Freak.”Clark can’t say for sure who turns red first, if himself or Bruce. But both end up with their cheeks burning as Harvey full on laughs at them.'or: Clark finally meets Bruce's ex boyfriend at an office party, showing Bruce a part of himself he thought he should keep hidden. Bruce likes a jealous Clark Kent way more than he probably should. And, while trying to keep their relationship a secret still, Bruce just has to have him then and there. I mean, what else can he do but take Clark into his office?

entry.title: In The Wee Small Hours Of The Morning
entry.summary:
Author: fartsmellyman

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,513Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 132

Summary: He pressed his thumb against the card in his pocket. It moved over the embossed letters in an absent act of reverence. Bruce Wayne. He'd call about the interview, he decided. That was the right thing. The professional thing to do for both of them. He would call, and he would be a journalist, and he would not think about the bathroom or the heartbeat or the way Bruce had gone still and careful the moment Clark had pulled back, asking "Do you want to stop? " like what he wanted really mattered, even if Bruce looked like he wanted to take, like Clark's answer was the only important thing weighing on him.He would absolutely not think about that. Or: Superman and Batman meet properly for the first time; Clark does not handle it as gracefully as he should, the heartbeat memorization wasn't on purpose, and he would like everyone to stop looking at him like that.

entry.title: HAIL MARY
entry.summary:
Author: sleepyteatimebear

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,756Chapters: 15/32Kudos: 140

Summary: Clark 'Superman' Kent, is a shoe-in for the NFL draft, a tall, dimpled, All-American-Type, College Football's Jesus. Bruce is well-known for his intense dedication to collegiate journalism, his all-black closet and the billions promised to him upon graduation. Bruce wants to sweep at the Collegiate Emmy's, Clark wants to go pro. So, they make a deal. Bruce can produce a media campaign that rallies the public behind Clark before Draft Day. Bruce helps to upkeep the Wayne Media Enterprise legacy, and Clark gets good press. But then, Clark and Bruce spend game-day after game-day together. Bruce asks Clark questions, studies him, captures him, writes all of him down. What's even more peculiar is Clark starts asking questions back. Questions that make Bruce feel like Clark wants to know him as more than just his shadow for the season. They can’t fall in love. It wouldn’t make practical sense. It wouldn’t make emotional sense. But couldn't it?

entry.title: Man of Steel, Heart of Glass
entry.summary:
Author: glitter_gutz

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,107Chapters: 11/29Kudos: 131

Summary: Bruce hates how Clark treats him like a petulant child, but he craves the adrenaline of being with the city's golden boy. Their intimacy is a battlefield. And it's marked by biting, scratching, and grip so tight it bruises. Proud marks that prove they were the ones to break the other’s composure. It’s a toxic, addictive cycle where the only time they feel truly close is when they are tearing each other apart and putting themselves back together.
